decisionSummary: A non-production optional advisory UI action/model was implemented for decoration.screen_shader and fixture-proven. The action remains row-specific, advanced/high-risk, explicit-trigger only, advisory-only, non-authoritative, and disconnected from validators, pending changes, write planning, apply flow, and write safety decisions. Visual GTK widget/file chooser wiring remains future work.
standaloneCompilerCommandScope: fixture tests use fake glslangValidator executables and existing helper regression may use real glslangValidator only on generated temp fixtures; no compiler command is wired into validation, pending changes, write planning, or apply flow

recommendedValidationPolicy.summary: The advisory UI action model may be used only as an explicit advanced non-production action for decoration.screen_shader. Advisory output remains non-authoritative and cannot approve, block, or bypass writes.

compatibilityGaps: No full GTK file chooser/widget execution path is implemented yet.
No screenshot or visual interaction proof exists yet for the advisory action.
Advisory glslangValidator output is not Hyprland runtime safety proof.
No production compile-aware validator is implemented.
No official Hyprland non-live screen-shader validation interface was found.
proofUsed: src/ui/model.rs implements ScreenShaderAdvisoryUiResultState and run_screen_shader_advisory_ui_action as a non-production UI action model for decoration.screen_shader only.
tests/screen_shader_advisory_ui_implementation_proof.rs proves not_run, running, passed, failed, unavailable, timed_out, temp_copy_failed, and cleanup_warning rendering states.
tests/screen_shader_advisory_ui_implementation_proof.rs proves missing consent does not invoke the helper, read a shader, or run a compiler.

tests/screen_shader_advisory_ui_implementation_proof.rs proves fixture pass/fail/unavailable/timeout/temp-copy/cleanup-warning outputs remain advisory-only and cannot approve, block, bypass, or alter write safety.
Existing production gate approval tests prove decoration.screen_shader remains writable and production-gated.
Aggregate reports link this proof without changing counts, SAFE_WRITABLE_ROWS, write allowlist, validators, pending changes, write planning, apply flow, or production gate behavior.
proofStillMissing: No full GTK file chooser/widget implementation exists for selecting a shader and displaying the advisory result visually.
No cancellation UI proof exists yet.
No screenshot-based UI proof exists yet.
No proof exists that glslangValidator output is equivalent to Hyprland's OpenGL runtime compile/link behavior.
No production compile-aware validator implementation exists.
nextRecommendedSprint: Screen shader optional advisory GTK widget wiring proof sprint: wire the proven non-production action model into a visible advanced/high-risk UI control only if it remains explicit-trigger only, disconnected from write safety, and proves file chooser/result rendering/cancellation without reading real user shader files in tests.
